falsification_conditions.condition: The price closes above the previous 52-week high by 15% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sustained breakout above key resistance would invalidate the blowoff scenario, indicating continued bullish momentum rather than a crash.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume during the price increase exceeds 30% above the 6-month average volume
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Surge in volume during a price rise would contradict the blowoff pattern's typical low-volume divergence, signaling strong buying pressure instead of exhaustion.

falsification_conditions.condition: A major central bank (e.g., Fed, ECB) announces a stimulus package causing a 5% rally in the relevant index within 7 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: External intervention injecting liquidity would directly counteract the blowoff conditions, proving the HOLD signal incorrect.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
